description: A tourist asks for the best way to get to the Louvre Museum using public transportation.

nodes.task_description: Identify the destination (Louvre Museum) and mode of transport (public).
Retrieve public transportation information for the Louvre.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that the 'Palais Royal - Musée du Louvre' Metro station is the closest stop.

nodes.task_description: Provide the tourist with the correct Metro line and station information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the directions to the tourist.
